processingFee: PKR 3,800 upfront for salaried and businessmen, plus FED (15% to 16% region wise); income estimation charges actual for businessmen; documentation charges and old vehicle valuation charges at actual; processing charges are not applicable for Roshan Digital Account holders
eligibilityCriteria: Regular Car Ijarah is available for salaried professionals and businessmen. Salaried professionals: permanent employees require 3 months in current job with minimum 2 years continuous employment history, contractual employees require 6 months in current job with minimum 3 years continuous employment history, net take-home income must be more than 2 times monthly rental, spouse income can be clubbed up to 50%, and data check plus e-CIB must be clear. Businessmen: minimum 2 years continuous involvement in current business or industry, proprietor/partner/director status required where applicable, net take-home income must be more than 2 times monthly rental, spouse income can be clubbed up to 50%, and data check plus e-CIB must be clear. For Roshan Digital Account holders, financing is available for all Roshan Digital Account holders including foreign currency account holders, with minimum age 25 years, maximum age at maturity 60 years for salaried professionals and 65 years for businessmen/self-employed professionals, minimum 2 years continuous employment history for salaried professionals, minimum 3 years business experience for businessmen/self-employed professionals, and all monthly repayments including proposed Ijarah rental must not exceed 40% of net take-home income.
requiredDocuments: Required documents include application form, salary proof or business proof, recent bank statements, nominee CNIC copy, photograph and specimen signature card
description: Pakistan’s first Riba-free car financing based on Islamic Ijarah, offering low upfront payment, rental payment starting after vehicle delivery, quick processing, partial prepayment and early settlement facility, option for new and used vehicles, residual value plan for selected locally assembled vehicles, and Takaful-based protection instead of conventional insurance.

processingFee: PKR 2,200 + FED (non-refundable)
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani residents aged 20 to 65 years (businessmen/self-employed) and 21 to 60 years (salaried). Minimum income requirement is PKR 40,000 for salaried individuals and PKR 75,000 for self-employed/businessmen. For 250cc bikes, higher income requirements apply (PKR 150,000 salaried and PKR 200,000 businessmen). Employment tenure requirement is minimum 6 months for permanent salaried and 1 year for contractual employees. Businessmen must provide proof of business for at least 2 years. Debt burden ratio must not exceed 40% of net monthly income.
description: Shariah-compliant motorcycle financing based on Musawamah. Ownership is transferred to the customer after delivery. Flexible down payment options. Quick processing within 5–7 working days. Available for both gasoline and electric bikes. Direct debit payment facility from Meezan Bank account.

schemeName: Meezan Easy Home - Islamic House Finance
processingFee: PKR 10,000 + FED (~16%). Additional legal, valuation, and documentation charges at actual.
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani nationals (resident and non-resident) are eligible. Minimum age 25 years and maximum 65 years at maturity (or retirement age for salaried). Co-applicant allowed (must be immediate family member). Minimum monthly income: PKR 50,000 for salaried/self-employed professionals and PKR 100,000 for businessmen. Minimum employment tenure: 2 years for salaried and 3 years for businessmen. Debt burden ratio and credit history (e-CIB) must meet bank requirements.
description: Shariah-compliant home financing based on Diminishing Musharakah. Joint ownership structure with gradual transfer of ownership to customer. Flexible partial prepayment option. Affordable and reducing monthly rental payments. High financing limits. Availability of Shariah-compliant Takaful (life coverage). Multiple product options including purchase, construction, renovation, and balance transfer.

processingFee: PKR 6,000 + FED (may vary; earlier sources mention PKR 5,000 + FED)
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani residents with valid CNIC. Salaried, self-employed businessmen, or pensioners are eligible. Minimum income: PKR 100,000 (salaried), PKR 200,000 (contractual), PKR 500,000 (businessman). Property must be owned by applicant or immediate family. Applicant must be active tax filer, have a Meezan Bank account, and electricity meter installed. Minimum employment tenure: 2 years (salaried), 5 years (business). Age limits: typically 20–60 years (salaried) and up to 65 years (businessmen) at maturity.
description: Shariah-compliant solar financing based on Musawamah. Helps reduce electricity bills by up to 50%. Financing available for on-grid, off-grid, and hybrid systems. No early termination charges. Flexible down payment options. No collateral required. Monthly installments auto-deducted from bank account. Fast processing (~7 working days). Supports clean energy adoption and net-metering potential.

schemeName: Meezan Consumer Ease - Durable Goods Financing
processingFee: PKR 1,800 (non-refundable) + actual legal/documentation charges
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani adult permanent residents. Salaried individuals aged 20–60 years and businessmen/SEP aged 20–65 years. Minimum income: PKR 25,000 (salaried) and PKR 40,000 (businessmen/SEP). Applicant must have a Meezan Bank account.
description: Shariah-compliant financing for purchasing consumer durable goods such as air conditioners, refrigerators, generators, etc. Easy installment plans with flexible tenure. No late payment charges. Quick approval and structured financing limits. Enables customers to buy essential household items without upfront full payment.

processingFee: N/A
eligibilityCriteria: Individual farmers (farm & non-farm) and corporate farming entities requiring tractors.
description: Provides Shariah-compliant financing for acquiring tractors and mechanized farming equipment. Helps improve farming productivity and efficiency.

processingFee: N/A
eligibilityCriteria: Individuals and corporate entities having cash collateral (MBL COIs, certificates, lien-marked assets).
description: Fast-track financing solution for agricultural needs with flexible Islamic financing modes. Suitable for customers with collateral.

processingFee: N/A
eligibilityCriteria: Individual farmers engaged in farming activities and corporate farming entities.
description: Provides financing for agricultural inputs such as seeds, fertilizers, and other crop-related expenses. Helps farmers manage seasonal cash flow.

processingFee: As per bank policy
eligibilityCriteria: All SMEs (new or existing businesses) not currently borrowing from Meezan Bank.
description: Provides financing for SMEs for working capital and long-term business needs including equipment, machinery, and property purchase.

schemeName: Prime Minister’s Youth Business & Agriculture Loan Scheme (PMYBALS)
processingFee: As per bank policy
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani citizens aged 21 to 45 years (18 for IT professionals), including startups and existing SMEs.
description: Government-backed financing scheme aimed at empowering youth with business and agricultural financing opportunities.

processingFee: Processing fee applicable as per bank policy
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani or eligible foreign nationals. Salaried individuals (age 21–60) with minimum monthly salary PKR 50,000. Self-employed individuals (age 21–65) with minimum monthly balance PKR 75,000.
description: Instant loan disbursement via Alfa App (within 60 seconds for eligible customers). Flexible repayment options. No collateral required. Top-up facility available. Discounted rates for women. Multiple repayment channels including Alfa App, internet banking, direct debit, branch payments, ATM/CDM, and cross cheque.

processingFee: Processing fee applicable
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani National Identity Card holder. Eligible for salaried individuals, professionals, self-employed individuals, and individuals with consistent income. Salaried applicants must have minimum gross salary of PKR 30,000 per month; private sector age 21–65 years and government sector age 21–60 years at loan maturity. Permanent employees must have at least 6 months total work experience, while contractual employees must have at least 1 year total work experience. Self-employed businessmen, professionals, and others must have minimum gross income of PKR 50,000 per month, age 21–70 years at loan maturity, and at least 1 year in current business.
description: Financing available for new and used locally assembled/manufactured vehicles. Competitive variable markup rates. Residual Value option for lower monthly installments. Partial payment and early settlement options available. Deferred insurance and registration financing available. Quick approval process with minimal documentation.

processingFee: Application, processing and other charges apply as per Bank Alfalah Schedule of Charges.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals, self-employed professionals, businessmen, non-resident Pakistanis and other eligible segments subject to Bank Alfalah policy. Spouse or blood relatives may be added as co-borrowers to improve eligibility. Approval is subject to income assessment, debt burden ratio, property valuation, legal verification and internal credit checks.
description: Bank Alfalah Home Finance provides financing for home purchase, construction, renovation, solar installation and balance transfer. It offers flexible tenure, multiple pricing options, co-borrower facility, partial payment option, life insurance and property insurance coverage, legal counseling and repayment flexibility.

processingFee: Processing fee and other applicable charges as per Bank Alfalah policy and Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: For salaried individuals: valid CNIC/SNIC/NICOP/POC holder, minimum net monthly income PKR 50,000, age 25 years until retirement, and minimum experience of 2 years for permanent employees or 3 to 5 years for contractual employees. For self-employed, businessmen, and others: valid CNIC/SNIC/NICOP/POC holder, minimum net monthly income PKR 100,000, age 25 to 70 years, and minimum experience of 3 years. The property where the solar system is installed must be residential and owned by the borrower, spouse, or blood relatives; if owned by spouse or blood relatives, NOC/undertaking from the owner is required.
description: Financing for residential solar energy systems with repayment tenure from 3 to 10 years and equal monthly installments. Offers variable or hybrid pricing options, access to Bank Alfalah-approved solar vendors, competitive insurance coverage, co-borrower support for spouse or blood relatives, and flexible payment options including balloon or partial prepayments and early settlement with nominal charges.

processingFee: PKR 2,000 or 2% of loan amount (whichever is higher), maximum PKR 20,000
eligibilityCriteria: NBP account holders who are permanent or contractual employees of Federal, Provincial, Semi-Government and Autonomous bodies receiving salary through NBP.
description: Quick processing and fast disbursement. No collateral required. Easy monthly installments through salary account deduction.

processingFee: PKR 5,000 (up to 3M), PKR 10,000 (3M–5M), PKR 12,500 (above 5M) + actual legal/valuation charges
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani resident CNIC holders with clean eCIB/DataCheck and maintaining salary or current account with NBP. Minimum income: PKR 35,000 (Salaried), PKR 150,000 (Business/SEP).
description: Financing for purchase, construction, renovation, and balance transfer of residential property. Long tenure up to 25 years. Co-applicant option available. Structured disbursement options.

processingFee: PKR 2,000 or 0.2% of finance amount (maximum PKR 5,000), whichever is higher
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani resident CNIC holders aged 18–60 years (salaried) or up to 65 years (self-employed/business). Applicant must own gold ornaments as collateral.
description: Quick financing against gold ornaments with minimal documentation, no minimum income requirement, flexible repayment, and no early payment penalty.

processingFee: 2% of loan amount or maximum PKR 20,000
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani resident CNIC holders with satisfactory credit history, meeting DBR and collateral requirements. Salaried individuals, government employees, and self-employed/business persons can apply.
description: Financing for installation of solar systems with flexible repayment, co-applicant option, and availability across all cities where NBP operates.

processingFee: No processing fee
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani citizens holding valid CNIC, first-time homeowners, not owning any housing unit, with clean e-CIB and data check reports.
description: Government-backed low-cost housing finance with subsidized markup, long tenure, no processing fee, and no prepayment penalty.

processingFee: Minimal charges; documentation simplified as per bank policy
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani farmers with agricultural land, valid CNIC, and satisfactory credit assessment by the bank.
description: Provides easy and quick access to agricultural financing with flexible revolving credit facility and minimal documentation.

processingFee: As per bank policy; minimal charges applicable
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani farmers and individuals involved in dairy and livestock farming with valid CNIC and acceptable credit profile.
description: Helps farmers increase milk production and improve livestock farming through easy financing with flexible repayment options.

processingFee: PKR 2,000 + FED (as per bank charges)
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani CNIC/NICOP holders including salaried, self-employed, business persons and NRPs with minimum income requirements and clean credit history.
description: Shariah-compliant auto financing with flexible repayment, quick processing, and support for both new and used vehicles.

processingFee: 1.5% of the loan amount or PKR 6,000, whichever is higher (applicable upon utilization of loan)
eligibilityCriteria: Salaried individuals working in the private sector, Government of Pakistan, and Armed Forces. Also available for persons who have taken a credit card, personal loan, or overdraft facility from any bank in Pakistan, existing MCB Car4U customers who took MCB car loan more than 1 year ago, and MCB salaried customers whose salary has been credited in MCB for more than a year.
requiredDocuments: documents include salary slip or proof of income;
description: Fast, affordable, and easy personal financing option. No collateral required. No processing fee if loan is not approved. Available in multiple approved cities with flexible repayment tenure.

processingFee: PKR 8,000 for SI/SEP; PKR 10,000 for others
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals, self-employed professionals, self-employed businessmen, and NRPs. Salaried age 20 to 60 years; SEP/SEB/NRPs age 25 to 65 years. Salaried minimum gross salary PKR 40,000 for permanent employees and PKR 50,000 for contractual employees. SEP/SEB minimum monthly income PKR 50,000. NRP minimum monthly verifiable income PKR 300,000.
description: Home financing for purchase of constructed house, plot plus construction, construction on self-owned plot, and renovation. Flexible tenure with grace period options depending on financing purpose.

processingFee: Rs. 5,000 processing fee plus insurance charges
eligibilityCriteria: Salaried individuals and self-employed professionals/business persons. Age 25–60 years (salaried) and up to 65 years (self-employed). Minimum salary PKR 40,000 (salaried) or PKR 50,000 income (self-employed). Salary account with any bank.
description: Financing facility for installation of solar energy systems to reduce electricity costs, with long-term savings, affordable markup, and flexible repayment options.

processingFee: Rs. 2,500 non-refundable
eligibilityCriteria: Government, semi-government, federal, and provincial department employees having salary account in Bank of Punjab. Age 19 to 59 years. Minimum gross salary PKR 17,500 monthly.
description: Personal loan for personal needs with fixed markup, easy monthly installments, no pre-payment penalty, and life insurance coverage.

processingFee: Rs. 6,000 plus FED (non-refundable)
eligibilityCriteria: Roshan Digital Account (RDA) holders / Naya Pakistan Certificate holders. Local nominee or co-borrower in Pakistan is mandatory. Salaried and self-employed individuals allowed. Age 21 to 65 years. Minimum 6 months employment (salaried) or 6 months business/professional experience (self-employed).
description: Auto financing facility for RDA holders with preferential markup rates, special insurance packages, fast and hassle-free processing, and priority vehicle delivery.

processingFee: Rs. 15,000 up to PKR 10M and Rs. 25,000 above PKR 10M
eligibilityCriteria: Resident/self-cultivating farmers with minimum 10 acres cultivated land. Age 21 to 60 years. Valid CNIC required. Must not be defaulter of any financial institution. Must provide two satisfactory market verification reports.
description: Short-term financing facility for farmers to purchase farm inputs such as seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and fungicides to support agricultural production.

schemeName: Prime Minister's Youth Business & Agriculture Loan Scheme
processingFee: Rs. 100 (non-refundable, inclusive of CNIC verification charges)
eligibilityCriteria: All Pakistani citizens holding CNIC aged 21 to 45 years (18 years for IT/E-commerce). Small and Medium Enterprises including startups and existing businesses are eligible. For agriculture, farmers must meet SBP criteria. Must not have overdue loans or adverse credit history.
description: Government-backed financing scheme providing affordable loans to youth for business and agriculture sectors, supporting entrepreneurship, SMEs, and farming activities across Pakistan.

schemeName: BOP Agri Kissan Dost Production Loan
processingFee: As per SOC
eligibilityCriteria: Valid CNIC holder engaged in crop production with minimum land cultivation of 5 acres either self-owned or jointly with family. Age between 21 and 65 years, with maximum 68 years at maturity. Clean eCIB with nil write-off history and two positive market checks required.
description: Production financing facility for working capital needs including purchase of farm inputs such as seeds, fertilizers, pesticides and other allied agricultural expenses for crop production, orchards, and nurseries.

processingFee: As per SOC
eligibilityCriteria: Individuals and entities engaged in poultry, dairy/livestock, and fisheries. Minimum 3 years relevant experience required. Clear ownership of collateral, valid CNIC, clean eCIB with nil write-off history, and two positive market checks required.
description: Financing facility for non-farm agriculture sectors including poultry, livestock, dairy, and fisheries to support business operations and expansion in agricultural value chain.

processingFee: Rs. 5,000 per vehicle
eligibilityCriteria: Individuals, SMEs, corporate entities and organizations involved in agriculture sector. Age between 21 to 65 years (maximum 65 years at maturity). Valid CNIC required with clean eCIB credit history.
description: Financing facility for farmers and agricultural businesses to purchase commercial and semi-commercial vehicles for agricultural and business use with flexible tenure and structured repayment.

processingFee: Rs. 2,000 (non-refundable)
eligibilityCriteria: Male, female, and transgender applicants aged 20 to 50 years. Citizen of Pakistan and resident of Punjab with valid CNIC. Eligible for new and existing businesses. Includes university graduates, diploma/certificate holders (TVET), artisans, and skilled workers.
description: Government-backed subsidized loan scheme for small and medium enterprises to promote entrepreneurship, support startups, and expand existing businesses with low markup rates.

processingFee: Applicable after loan approval and included in down payment (as per bank policy)
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani individuals aged 21 years and above. Salaried individuals, self-employed professionals, businessmen, agriculturists, landlords (rental income), and individuals with foreign remittances or fixed/term deposit income can apply. Minimum monthly income requirement is approximately PKR 40,000. Minimum experience: 6–12 months for salaried individuals and 1–2 years for business/self-employed individuals.
description: Flexible car financing for new and used vehicles with competitive markup rates. Option to include spouse income for higher eligibility. Fast processing and wide dealer network across Pakistan.

processingFee: Standard Home Loan: up to PKR 8,500 non-refundable. Balance Transfer Facility: up to PKR 4,500. Low-cost housing special segment: up to PKR 2,500. Non-Resident Pakistanis: up to PKR 10,000. Legal, appraisal, income estimation, and property insurance charges are at actual where applicable.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals, self-employed businessmen, self-employed professionals, landlords, and eligible Non-Resident Pakistanis. Applicants must hold CNIC, SNIC, NICOP, Pakistan Origin Card, or other accepted identity documents under bank policy. Minimum monthly net income is PKR 75,000 for salaried applicants, PKR 100,000 for self-employed applicants, and PKR 500,000 equivalent for Non-Resident Pakistani salaried applicants. Debt burden ratio is up to 50% of net monthly income. For salaried applicants, at least 2 years overall experience is required. For businessmen and self-employed applicants, 3 years business experience is required. Local co-borrower is mandatory for Non-Resident Pakistanis.
description: Financing is available for home purchase, plot purchase plus construction, home construction, home renovation, and balance transfer. The scheme offers long repayment tenure, competitive floating markup, financing up to PKR 50 million, property insurance, co-borrower and income clubbing options, and availability for resident as well as eligible overseas Pakistanis.

processingFee: Processing fee approximately PKR 7,000 plus FED. Additional charges may include vendor survey, appraisal, documentation, legal, and other charges as per Schedule of Bank Charges.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried and self-employed individuals. Minimum net income requirement is PKR 100,000 per month for salaried individuals and PKR 150,000 per month for self-employed individuals. Minimum employment/business experience required is 2 years for salaried individuals and 3 years for self-employed professionals/businessmen. Debt burden ratio is up to 50%. Age requirement is 25 to 65 years or up to retirement age (for salaried individuals), whichever is earlier at loan maturity.
description: Provides financing for installation of solar energy systems for residential use. Helps reduce electricity costs and promotes clean energy adoption. Offers flexible tenure, competitive floating markup, and access to approved solar vendors for installation.

processingFee: Processing and other charges applicable as per MCB Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani students enrolled in Higher Education programs. Applicant must have at least 50% marks (or equivalent) in last public examination. Valid admission and acceptance from LUMS is required with confirmation from the university. Age requirement is minimum 21 years and maximum 45 years at the time of loan approval.
description: Provides financial support to students for higher education expenses including tuition, admission, and other academic costs. Helps students manage upfront education costs with flexible repayment tenure and grace period.

processingFee: Processing and other charges applicable as per MCB Schedule of Charges. Legal, valuation, and documentation charges apply where required.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Non-Resident Pakistanis (NRPs) holding Roshan Digital Account with valid NICOP/POC. Applicable to salaried and self-employed individuals. Age requirement: 20 to 60 years for salaried and 20 to 65 years for non-salaried applicants. Income criteria allows financing up to 50% of net disposable income. Minimum employment/business tenure: 1 year (with lien) or 2 years (without lien). Co-applicant requirements vary by variant and may include family members residing in Pakistan.
description: Enables overseas Pakistanis to purchase, construct, or renovate property in Pakistan remotely through digital processing. Offers competitive KIBOR-based pricing, flexible tenure, lien and non-lien options, and integration with Roshan Digital Account. Allows repatriation flexibility and supports investment in approved housing projects.

processingFee: Processing and other charges applicable as per MCB Schedule of Charges. No processing fee if loan is not approved.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Non-Resident Pakistanis (NRPs) holding Roshan Digital Account. Lien-based: Customers maintaining deposit or investment in Naya Pakistan Certificates or RDA. Non-lien based: Salaried or self-employed individuals or those receiving regular remittances from abroad. Age requirement: minimum 22 years and maximum 60 years at loan maturity (non-lien based). Minimum equity requirement: 15% (non-lien based). Minimum income: equivalent to USD 2,500 (non-Gulf) or AED 6,500 (Gulf countries).
description: Allows overseas Pakistanis to finance new, used, or imported vehicles remotely through Roshan Digital Account. Offers flexible lien-based and non-lien options, competitive markup rates, minimal documentation for lien-based cases, and quick digital processing.

processingFee: Processing and other charges applicable as per MCB Bank Schedule of Charges and SBP guidelines for agriculture financing.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers, growers, and agriculture-related individuals involved in farm and non-farm activities. Includes small farmers, commercial growers, and sugarcane growers linked with sugar mills. Eligibility is subject to land holding, crop requirements, repayment capacity, and bank credit assessment.
description: Provides financing for agricultural production needs including seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and working capital. Supports seasonal crop financing and revolving credit usage, helping farmers manage cash flow and improve productivity.

processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges are applied as per MCB Bank Schedule of Charges and SBP regulations.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers, individuals, firms, and companies involved in agriculture and related non-farm activities. Includes sectors such as livestock, poultry, fisheries, sericulture, farm mechanization, and agriculture development projects. Eligibility is subject to bank credit assessment, project feasibility, and compliance with SBP prudential regulations.
description: Provides flexible financing solutions for agriculture development projects, machinery, livestock, and non-farm rural activities. Supports both long-term investment and working capital needs. Enables farmers and businesses to expand operations and improve productivity.

processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges are applied as per MCB Bank Schedule of Charges. Additional costs such as registration, insurance, and taxes are borne by the customer.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers across Pakistan including small, medium, and large-scale farmers. Eligibility is based on repayment capacity, land holding, farming activity, and compliance with bank credit evaluation criteria.
description: Provides financing for purchase of tractors and allied agricultural equipment to promote mechanization. Enables farmers to increase productivity, reduce costs, and expand operational capacity.

processingFee: Applicable as per MCB Bank Schedule of Charges and financing terms.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers involved in agricultural activities requiring irrigation improvements, water conservation systems, or renewable energy-based irrigation solutions. Subject to bank credit evaluation and SBP guidelines.
description: Provides financing for irrigation infrastructure including water conservation, canal lining, reservoirs, and renewable energy solutions such as solar tube wells. Helps improve water efficiency, crop productivity, and farm income.

processingFee: Applicable as per MCB Bank Schedule of Charges and financing terms.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers, livestock owners, and agribusinesses involved in dairy and meat production. Includes individuals and entities requiring financing for livestock purchase, farm development, or related operations, subject to bank policy and credit evaluation.
description: Provides financial support for livestock farming, dairy production, meat processing, and related value chain activities. Helps improve farm productivity, expand operations, and support income generation in the livestock sector.

processingFee: Applicable as per MCB Bank Schedule of Charges and financing terms.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for poultry farmers, hatchery operators, and agribusinesses involved in poultry production, processing, and value chain activities. Subject to bank credit evaluation and policy requirements.
description: Provides financial support for poultry farming operations, infrastructure development, hatcheries, and value-added poultry processing. Helps expand production capacity, improve efficiency, and support income generation in the poultry sector.

processingFee: Applicable as per MCB Bank Schedule of Charges and financing terms.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers engaged in horticulture activities including fruits, vegetables, and related farming operations. Applicants must demonstrate viable project plans, repayment capacity based on cash flows, and meet bank documentation and security requirements.
description: Provides financing for horticulture development including fruit and vegetable farming, infrastructure, irrigation, machinery, and value addition processes. Supports improved crop quality, productivity, and farmer income.

processingFee: Processing fee is deducted from the approved loan amount at the time of disbursement as per Bank's Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: For salaried individuals: Pakistani national, age 21 to 59 years, minimum monthly net salary PKR 25,000 (ABL account) or PKR 35,000 (other bank), minimum 6 months banking relationship, employment type permanent or direct contract, and minimum employment duration of 2 years. For self-employed/business professionals: Pakistani national, age 21 to 64 years, minimum monthly net income PKR 45,000 (ABL account) or PKR 55,000 (other bank), banking relationship of 12 months with ABL or 24 months with another bank, and business tenure of 2 to 3 years.
description: Personal financing facility with equal monthly installments and flexible repayment period of 1 to 4 years. Offers simple documentation, no hidden charges, competitive markup rates, finance enhancement option, and prepayment facility (partial and full). Available in major cities including Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Sialkot, Gujranwala, and Hyderabad.

processingFee: Processing fee applicable as per Bank's Schedule of Charges; no processing fee charged if application is rejected
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani national aged 21 years or above with minimum 6 months banking relationship with ABL or another bank. For salaried individuals: maximum age 59 years, permanent employment, minimum 2 years work experience, and minimum net monthly salary of PKR 40,000. For self-employed individuals: maximum age 64 years, minimum 2 years business experience, and minimum net monthly income of PKR 60,000.
description: Car financing facility with financing up to PKR 3 million and up to 70% of vehicle price. Offers equal monthly installment repayment, flexible tenure options, competitive markup rates, simple documentation, no hidden costs, and no processing fee in case of application rejection.

processingFee: Processing, legal, valuation, insurance, and other charges applicable as per Bank's Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani national aged between 25 to 57 years. For salaried individuals: minimum 6 months banking relationship, at least 3 years employment, and minimum net monthly salary of PKR 50,000. For self-employed/business professionals: at least 1 year banking relationship with ABL or 2 years with another bank, minimum business tenure of 2 years (ABL) or 3 years (other banks), and minimum monthly income of PKR 75,000 (ABL) or PKR 100,000 (other banks).
description: Home financing facility for purchase, construction, renovation, and loan transfer with flexible repayment tenure up to 25 years. Offers competitive variable markup rates, life insurance coverage, and availability in major cities including Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Gujranwala, Sialkot, Multan, and Hyderabad.

processingFee: Processing fee applicable after approval as per Bank's Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani national aged 21 to 59 years. For salaried individuals: permanent employee, minimum 2 years employment, minimum 6 months banking relationship with ABL or any other bank, and minimum salary of PKR 50,000. For self-employed individuals: minimum 1 year relationship with ABL or 2 years with another bank, minimum business/profession tenure of 2 years with ABL or 3 years with another bank, and minimum net monthly income of PKR 75,000 with ABL or PKR 100,000 with other banks.
description: Financing facility for residential solar energy systems with loan amounts from PKR 200,000 to PKR 3,000,000, repayment tenure up to 7 years, simple documentation, no hidden cost, and financing available on eligible owned or jointly owned residential property. Processing fee is charged only after approval.

schemeName: Mera Ghar Mera Ashiana (MGMA) Housing Finance
processingFee: No processing fee and no prepayment/early settlement penalty under the scheme as per policy.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani citizens with valid CNIC who are first-time homeowners. Applicant must not own any residential property. Minimum disposable income requirement applies. Eligible for salaried and self-employed individuals. Age limits apply as per bank policy. Co-borrowers may be included subject to eligibility criteria.
description: Government-backed affordable housing finance scheme under SBP providing subsidized markup, high financing limits, and easy access to home ownership for low and middle-income individuals with flexible repayment options.

processingFee: Processing fee applicable only after loan approval and offer letter signing, as per Bank's Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani national aged 21 years or above. Minimum banking relationship: 6 months with ABL or 1 year with any other bank. For salaried individuals: maximum age 59 years, permanent or direct contract employee, salary credited to account for the last 6 months, and minimum net monthly salary of PKR 35,000. For self-employed individuals: maximum age 64 years, minimum 1 year in business, and minimum net monthly income of PKR 50,000.
description: Eco-friendly financing facility for brand-new locally assembled or manufactured electric bikes registered with the Excise/Motor Vehicle Department. Offers low markup rate, flexible repayment from 1 to 4 years, loan amount up to PKR 400,000, no hidden costs, and equal monthly installment repayment.

processingFee: Processing fee applicable only after loan approval and offer letter signing, as per Bank's Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani national female aged 21 years or above. Minimum banking relationship: 6 months with ABL or 1 year with any other bank. For salaried females: maximum age 59 years, permanent or direct contract employee, salary credited for last 6 months, minimum net monthly salary PKR 35,000. For self-employed females: maximum age 64 years, minimum 1 year in business, minimum net monthly income PKR 50,000.
description: Women-focused financing facility for purchasing brand-new locally assembled or manufactured scooties including conventional, electric, or hybrid models. Offers low markup rate, flexible repayment tenure, no hidden costs, and easy installment plans.

processingFee: Processing charges applicable as per prevailing Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: Minimum age: 21 years. Maximum age at loan maturity: 60 years for salaried permanent employees, 65 years for salaried contractual employees, 65 years for government pensioners, and 65 years for self-employed/business/professional applicants. Minimum monthly salary/income varies by segment. Permanent employees: GOP/Semi Govt/Autonomous Bodies PKR 35,000, Approved Company Category A PKR 40,000, Approved Company Category B and C PKR 50,000, Non-Approved Company PKR 70,000. Contractual employees: GOP/Semi Govt/Autonomous Bodies PKR 45,000, Approved Company Category A PKR 60,000, Approved Company Category B and C PKR 60,000, Non-Approved Company PKR 80,000. Pensioners: GOP/Semi Govt/Autonomous Bodies PKR 40,000. Self-employed/business/professional applicants: Branch customers PKR 100,000 and non-branch customers PKR 150,000. Eligible applicants include serving and retired officers/widows, serving and retired JCOs/equivalent and lower cadres/widows, civilians working in armed forces organizations on permanent and contractual basis, salaried individuals including GOP/Semi-Government/Autonomous Bodies employees, pensioners of GOP/Semi-Government/Autonomous Bodies, self-employed businessmen and women/professionals, specially abled persons/visually impaired persons/persons with disabilities, and Askari Bank employees.
description: Personal finance facility for education, wedding, home décor, debt consolidation, gadget purchase, travel, and other personal needs. Offers financing from PKR 50,000 to PKR 4,000,000, repayment through equal monthly installments, flexible tenure from 1 to 4 years, and top-up or enhancement facility after every 3 months.

schemeName: Askari Islamic Auto Finance – Ijarah Bis Sayyarah
processingFee: Low processing charges with no hidden charges as per bank policy
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani nationals eligible. Salaried individuals (age 21–60 years) and self-employed/business professionals (age 21–65 years at maturity). Minimum 6 months employment for salaried individuals. Minimum 1 year business continuity for self-employed/business applicants.
description: Shariah-compliant vehicle financing facility that allows customers to acquire new or used vehicles with flexible tenure, transparent pricing, and no upfront registration or takaful charges. Provides financial ease through structured monthly rental payments and protection in case of total loss or theft.

schemeName: Askari Islamic Home Finance – Home Musharakah
processingFee: Processing charges applicable as per prevailing Bank's Schedule of Charges
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani nationals eligible. Facility available in metropolitan areas of all cities where Askari Bank branches are located or as approved by the bank. Debt Burden Ratio must not exceed 50% of monthly net take-home income. Co-applicant income may be clubbed for credit assessment. For salaried individuals: confirmed regular employee with at least 6 months service with present employer; age 21 to 60 years at maturity for salaried permanent applicants and up to 65 years for contractual applicants. For business/self-employed persons: at least 3 years in current business; age 21 to 65 years at maturity. Co-applicant option available for first-blood relations including spouse, son, parent, brother, unmarried daughter, and sister.
description: Shariah-compliant home financing facility under Diminishing Musharakah for home buying, construction, renovation, extension, and balance transfer. Offers prompt processing, competitive rentals, clubbing of family income, flexible tenure, and financing for multiple residential purposes.

schemeName: Askari Islamic Home Finance – Mera Ghar Mera Ashiana (MGMA)
processingFee: Nil
eligibilityCriteria: First-time homeowners who are citizens of Pakistan holding valid CNICs and do not own any housing unit in their name. Applicable for purchase of house/flat, construction of house on already owned plot, or purchase of plot plus construction of house. Maximum housing unit size: house up to 10 Marla / 2720 sq. ft. and flat up to 1500 sq. ft. Minimum monthly income: salaried branch customers PKR 50,000, salaried contractual PKR 60,000, pensioners PKR 50,000, self-employed/business/professional branch customers PKR 100,000, and self-employed/business/professional non-branch customers PKR 150,000.
description: Government subsidy-based Shariah-compliant housing finance under Diminishing Musharakah for first-time homeowners. Offers affordable home ownership with subsidized pricing for the first 10 years, financing up to PKR 10 million, no processing fee, no prepayment or balloon payment penalty, and bank investment contribution up to 90% of forced sale value of the property.

schemeName: Askari Sahar Finance for Women Entrepreneurs
processingFee: PKR 2,000 – PKR 3,000 (non-refundable)
eligibilityCriteria: Women-owned businesses (SMEs). Minimum 1 year for existing business. Age 20–55 years depending on business type.
description: Special financing solution for women entrepreneurs to start, expand, and manage businesses with flexible terms and minimal equity requirements.

processingFee: Processing charges not specified on the provided page
eligibilityCriteria: Women farmers seeking financing for agricultural production and development needs, subject to bank credit assessment.
description: Dedicated finance facility for women farmers to support agricultural production and development needs. Offers both revolving finance and term finance options based on the applicant's assessed credit requirements.

processingFee: Processing fee applicable as per Askari Bank’s Schedule of Charges (SOC)
eligibilityCriteria: Farmers eligible for Shariah-compliant financing for irrigation and water management solutions, subject to bank credit assessment.
description: Shariah-compliant financing facility to support farmers in installing modern irrigation systems, improving water management, and increasing agricultural productivity.

processingFee: PKR 8,000 + FED (50% discount for Amal women account holders)
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani CNIC holder, age 18 to 70 years at maturity. Available for salaried individuals with minimum income of PKR 50,000 and self-employed individuals with minimum income of PKR 100,000, subject to bank approval.
description: Shariah-compliant personal financing facility for medical expenses, education, travel and other personal needs with fixed monthly installments and no early settlement charges.

processingFee: PKR 12,000 excluding FED, non-refundable; Amal women account holders can avail 50% discount. Upfront tracker fee PKR 22,000 excluding FED and monthly tracker management fee PKR 1,800 excluding FED also apply
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani citizens. Salaried employees: age 21 to 65 years at maturity, permanent income minimum PKR 30,000 per month or contractual income minimum PKR 50,000 per month, with 12 months current employment or 2 years continuous employment including 6 months current. Self-employed businessman/professional: age 21 to 70 years at maturity, minimum income PKR 40,000 per month, minimum 1 year in current business/industry. Other acceptable income sources include rental income, foreign remittance, sukuk, term deposit on lien basis, and pension income subject to documentary evidence.
requiredDocuments: Documents required for salaried applicants include CNIC, latest salary slip, 3 months bank statement, employment certificate, and latest utility bill;
description: Shariah-compliant car financing based on Diminishing Musharakah for locally manufactured new and used vehicles, with flexible tenure, residual value option, early settlement and partial pre-payment facility, co-partner facility, and Takaful coverage arranged through the bank.

processingFee: Standard Housing: PKR 12,000 + FED non-refundable; Amal women account holders can avail 50% discount on processing fee; additional actual charges apply for documentation, appraisal, income estimation, legal and external agency services
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani citizens in Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad and Rawalpindi. Salaried: approved company permanent employees minimum PKR 100,000 per month, contractual employees minimum PKR 150,000 per month, unapproved company minimum PKR 150,000 per month, age 21 to 60 years at maturity. Self Employed Professional (SEP): minimum PKR 150,000 per month, age 21 to 70 years at maturity, minimum 2 years continuous service in current profession/business. Self Employed Businessman (SEB): minimum PKR 200,000 per month, age 21 to 70 years at maturity, minimum 2 years continuous service in current profession/business. Non-Resident Pakistanis are also eligible subject to documentary requirements; NRP income minimum USD 4,000 per month.
description: Shariah-compliant home financing based on Diminishing Musharakah for purchase, construction, renovation and transfer of existing home finance facility, with partial and full settlement flexibility, property Takaful coverage, income clubbing option, and rental-income consideration.

processingFee: PKR 6,000 (excluding FED); additional upfront costs include equity participation and Takaful charges; payable via cross cheque or pay order
eligibilityCriteria: Pakistani citizens including Non-Resident Pakistanis. Cities include Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad and Rawalpindi. Salaried: minimum PKR 100,000 per month, age 21 to 60 years at maturity, employment tenure depends on approved or unapproved company criteria. Self Employed Professional (SEP) and Self Employed Businessman (SEB): minimum PKR 150,000 per month, age 21 to 70 years at maturity, minimum 2 years continuous service in current profession or business.
description: Shariah-compliant solar financing based on Diminishing Musharakah enabling customers to install solar energy systems with flexible payments, lower electricity costs and long-term energy savings while transitioning to clean and renewable energy.

processingFee: Case-to-case basis
eligibilityCriteria: Farmers, Farmer cum Traders, Commission Agents, Agriculture Traders, Livestock Farmers, Poultry Farmers, Fish Farmers, and other agriculture-related individuals or businesses. For SBP Electronic Warehouse Receipt Financing, eligible segments include individual farmers, farmer cum traders, and traders.
description: Shariah-compliant agricultural financing scheme offering support for crop production, farm development, machinery, livestock, renewable energy, and access to SBP subsidized and refinance schemes for agricultural growth.

processingFee: One-time processing fee of PKR 6,000 or 1.25% of loan amount, whichever is higher. Female account holders can get 50% discount on processing fee. FED applies on charges.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals whose salary is credited to an HBL account. Applicant must be at least 21 years old at loan application and 61 years or less at loan maturity. Minimum monthly salary requirement is PKR 35,000. Pensioners may also apply with minimum pension of PKR 35,000 credited for at least 3 months in HBL account, maximum age 65 years at loan maturity, and maximum loan amount PKR 1 million.
description: Quick personal financing for essential expenses such as medical bills, education fees, utility bills, vacations, wedding planning and home repairs. No security, deposit or guarantee required. Flexible repayment tenure. Online application through HBL Mobile App. Top-up facility available after 12 months for existing customers. Attractive rates and free life insurance.

processingFee: No fee is charged for the auto loan application form. Other applicable charges may include processing fee, vehicle registration charges, first-year insurance premium, partial payment charges and early settlement charges as per HBL Schedule of Charges.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani citizens residing in Pakistan or abroad with a regular, stable and verifiable income stream. Applicant must be at least 22 years old. Non-Resident Pakistanis maintaining a relationship with HBL Pakistan and/or HBL International may also apply. Joint application with a co-borrower is allowed, subject to bank criteria, and co-borrower income may be clubbed with applicant income.
description: Flexible and hassle-free car financing facility for purchasing a dream car. Customers can choose locally assembled vehicles on a fixed mark-up rate. Financing is available for new locally assembled passenger vehicles, new LCVs and used locally manufactured cars. Existing HBL customers may receive privileges and benefits subject to eligibility criteria.

processingFee: All applicable charges as per HBL Islamic Schedule of Bank Charges. Exact fee not disclosed publicly.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani residents and non-resident Pakistanis (GCC only). Salaried individuals must be at least 25 years old with minimum income of PKR 50,000. Self-employed individuals must be at least 30 years old with minimum income of PKR 100,000. Non-resident applicants must have income equivalent to PKR 400,000 and meet employment history requirements.
description: HBL Islamic Home Finance provides a Shariah-compliant solution for home ownership, construction, renovation and balance transfer. It offers long tenure, high financing limits and takaful coverage to ensure secure and structured home financing aligned with Islamic principles.

processingFee: One-time processing fee of PKR 6,000 or 1.25% of approved limit (whichever is higher). Annual fee of PKR 5,000 applicable after first year. FED applicable on all charges.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals and self-employed business owners. Salaried individuals must have minimum net income of PKR 75,000 with salary credited into HBL and age between 21–57 years. Self-employed applicants must have business history of at least 2 years with minimum 1-year relationship with HBL, age between 25–62 years and average balance of PKR 50,000.
description: HBL ReadyCash provides instant access to funds through a flexible running finance facility. Customers are charged markup only on the amount utilized, making it a convenient short-term liquidity solution with multiple usage and repayment options.

schemeName: HBL Zarkhez-e-Assan Digital Zarai Qarza Agriculture Loan
processingFee: No major upfront collateral charges. Other applicable service charges may apply as per HBL policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Applicant must be a Pakistani resident aged between 21 and 65 years with valid CNIC verified by NADRA. Mobile number must be registered against CNIC. Applicant must own or cultivate farming land not exceeding 12.5 acres.
description: This digital agriculture loan enables small farmers to access quick, collateral-free financing through a simplified digital process. It improves access to agricultural inputs, enhances crop productivity and supports financial inclusion under SBP-backed initiatives.

processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges as per HBL policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers cultivating owned or leased land. Applicant must be between 18 and 65 years of age, must provide acceptable collateral/security, comply with bank and regulatory policies, and should not be a defaulter or involved in legal disputes over pledged land.
description: This tractor financing facility enables farmers to improve productivity through mechanization. It provides easier access to agricultural machinery with flexible repayment aligned to crop cycles, faster processing and nationwide availability.

schemeName: HBL Dairy and Livestock Agriculture Loan
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges as per HBL policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for dairy and livestock farmers with valid CNIC, minimum 5 years relevant business experience, and acceptable collateral as per bank requirements. Applicant must be between 18 and 75 years of age, comply with regulatory policies, and must not be a defaulter or involved in legal disputes over pledged property.
description: This financing facility supports dairy and livestock farmers by providing working capital for daily operations and business growth. It ensures easy access to funds with flexible repayment options and allows farmers to improve productivity and profitability.

schemeName: HBL Farm Irrigation Solutions Agriculture Loan
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges as per HBL policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers holding valid CNIC and cultivating owned or leased land. Applicant must be between 18 and 75 years of age, provide acceptable collateral, meet regulatory requirements and must not be a defaulter of any financial institution.
description: This financing facility enables farmers to invest in modern irrigation solutions, improving water efficiency and crop productivity. It supports both conventional and advanced irrigation systems with flexible repayment options and nationwide availability.

processingFee: Processing fee of PKR 12,000 + FED. Additional charges include vehicle registration, first-year insurance premium, and applicable early settlement or partial payment charges.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani citizens holding valid CNIC with a regular and stable income. Salaried individuals must have minimum gross salary of PKR 35,000 (age 21–60 years). Self-employed individuals must have minimum income of PKR 50,000 (age 21–70 years). Facility is also available for business owners, landlords, remittance earners and pensioners.
description: UBL Drive provides flexible and convenient car financing solutions with options for new and used vehicles. Customers can choose between fixed and floating markup rates, flexible tenure options, and residual value plan for lower monthly installments. Complimentary tracker services and competitive insurance rates enhance security and affordability.

processingFee: Processing, appraisal and income estimation charges apply. These charges are non-refundable. Additional external agency charges such as legal and valuation fees are borne by the applicant.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for resident Pakistani salaried individuals, self-employed professionals and business persons. Minimum monthly income requirement is PKR 150,000. Applicant age must be between 21 to 65 years. Income clubbing option available for spouses. Non-resident Pakistanis holding valid NICOP and overseas residency may also apply.
description: UBL Address provides flexible home financing solutions for buying, building or renovating homes. Customers benefit from competitive KIBOR-linked markup rates, flexible long-term tenure, balance transfer facility and free property insurance. Facility also allows income clubbing and partial prepayments for better affordability.

processingFee: Processing fee is charged upon loan approval. Additional charges may include documentation fee, insurance charges and applicable bank fees.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals with a regular income stream. Salary must be credited in UBL or any other bank in Pakistan. Minimum net monthly income requirement is PKR 40,000. Applicant age must be between 21 to 60 years.
description: UBL CashPlus offers quick and flexible personal financing for salaried individuals. It provides competitive rates, fast processing, flexible repayment options, and additional facilities like loan top-ups and balance transfer for existing loans.

processingFee: Processing and documentation charges apply as per bank policy. Additional charges may include insurance, collateral evaluation and applicable government levies.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals, self-employed professionals and businesspersons maintaining accounts with UBL or any other bank. Salaried applicants must be between 21 to 60 years at maturity, while self-employed applicants can be up to 65 years at maturity.
description: UBL Secured Personal Loan offers higher financing limits with lower risk through collateral-backed lending. Customers benefit from quick processing, lower markup rates compared to unsecured loans, flexible repayment options and higher loan eligibility based on secured assets.

processingFee: Processing and documentation charges apply as per bank policy. Additional collateral and legal verification charges may also be applicable.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani residents engaged in agriculture. Applicant must hold valid CNIC/SNIC, be between 20 to 60 years of age, and must be a genuine farmer involved in cultivation or agricultural activities with owned or leased land. Applicant must not be a defaulter and should be able to provide acceptable collateral as per bank requirements.
description: UBL Zarai Khushhali provides financial support to the farming community for both production and development needs. It covers expenses such as seeds, fertilizers, pesticides and working capital, along with long-term financing for land development, orchards, dairy, poultry and fish farming.

processingFee: Processing and documentation charges apply as per bank policy. Additional collateral evaluation and legal charges may also be applicable.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani residents engaged in farming or agriculture-related businesses. Applicant must hold valid CNIC/SNIC, be between 20 to 60 years of age, and must be a genuine farmer with owned or leased agricultural land. Applicant must not be a defaulter and should be able to provide acceptable collateral as per bank requirements.
description: UBL Farm Machinery & Transport Finance enables farmers and agri-entrepreneurs to purchase machinery and transport equipment for mechanization and expansion. It supports storage, processing, packaging and transportation of agricultural produce, improving efficiency and productivity.

processingFee: Processing and documentation charges apply as per bank policy. Additional collateral and legal charges may also be applicable.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for women applicants residing in Pakistan. Applicant must hold valid CNIC/SNIC, be between 21 to 60 years of age, and must be engaged in farming or related activities. Applicant must not be a defaulter and should be able to provide acceptable collateral as per bank requirements.
description: UBL Urooj is designed to promote financial inclusion for women by providing access to agricultural and working capital financing. It supports women engaged in farm and non-farm activities by enabling them to invest in machinery, equipment and working capital needs.

processingFee: Processing fee of PKR 4,000 (plus FED) or 1.25% of the financing amount, whichever is higher. No processing fee is charged for declined applications.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals of approved companies and self-employed/business professionals (secured financing only). Minimum age is 21 years and maximum age is 60 years for salaried and 65 years for self-employed applicants at maturity. Minimum monthly net income ranges from PKR 50,000 to PKR 200,000 depending on employment type and company category. Minimum employment length is 1 year or 2 years continuous service with permanent status.
description: Soneri Personal Finance provides quick and flexible financial solutions for personal, domestic and household needs. It offers both secured and unsecured financing options, competitive KIBOR-linked rates, quick processing and flexible repayment plans with insurance coverage.

processingFee: Processing fee of PKR 10,000 (plus FED) for financing up to PKR 5 million, PKR 15,000 (plus FED) for financing up to PKR 10 million, and PKR 25,000 (plus FED) for financing above PKR 10 million. Additional charges apply for co-borrower processing and other services. No processing fee on declined applications.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals, businessmen, self-employed professionals and individuals receiving foreign remittance. Minimum monthly income requirement is PKR 100,000 for salaried individuals, PKR 300,000 for businessmen/self-employed and PKR 200,000 for remittance earners. Applicant age must be at least 21 years and not exceed 60 years for salaried and 70 years for self-employed at loan maturity. Minimum employment requirement is 2 years or 3 years continuous service, and minimum 3 years for business continuity.
description: Soneri Ghar Finance enables customers to fulfill their dream of owning or improving a home with flexible financing options. It supports purchase, construction, renovation and balance transfer with competitive KIBOR-linked rates and long-term repayment flexibility.

processingFee: Processing fee of PKR 5,750 (plus FED) for new vehicles and PKR 6,250 (plus FED) for used vehicles. Charges may vary as per bank campaigns and policies.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals, businessmen, self-employed professionals, agriculturists, rental income individuals and foreign remittance earners. Minimum age is 21 years and maximum age at maturity is 60 years for salaried and 70 years for self-employed applicants. Minimum monthly income requirement starts from PKR 25,000 and higher for specific segments. Minimum employment requirement is 1 year or 2 years continuous service, and minimum 2 years for business continuity.
description: Soneri Car Finance provides flexible financing solutions for purchasing new or used locally manufactured vehicles. It offers competitive KIBOR-linked markup rates, flexible tenure options, quick processing and no prepayment penalty for early settlement.

processingFee: Processing fee applicable at 100% standard charges as per bank policy. Additional insurance, documentation and tracker charges apply.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals, self-employed professionals and businessmen meeting Soneri Bank’s standard car financing criteria. Applicant must meet minimum income, employment and age requirements as defined by the bank.
description: Soneri Car Finance Fixed Rate offers predictable and stable monthly installments by locking the markup rate for the entire tenure. It protects customers from interest rate fluctuations and provides ease of financial planning.

processingFee: Processing fee of PKR 10,000 (plus FED) per approved application. No processing fee is charged for declined applications.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for salaried individuals of approved companies and self-employed professionals/businessmen maintaining accounts with Soneri Bank. Minimum age is 25 years and maximum age at maturity is 65 years. Minimum monthly income requirement is PKR 100,000 for salaried individuals and PKR 250,000 for self-employed applicants. Minimum employment experience is 2–3 years and minimum 5 years business continuity for self-employed individuals.
description: Soneri Renewable Energy Finance enables customers to install solar energy systems for domestic use with affordable financing. It offers fixed low-rate financing under SBP refinance scheme, flexible tenure options and reduced electricity dependency with environmentally friendly energy solutions.

schemeName: Soneri Ladies First Refinance and Credit Guarantee Scheme
processingFee: Processing and documentation charges apply as per bank and SBP policy. Charges may vary based on financing structure and applicable guarantees.
eligibilityCriteria: Available exclusively for women entrepreneurs for setting up new businesses or expanding existing ones. Applicant must meet SBP refinance eligibility criteria and provide necessary business feasibility and documentation as required by the bank.
description: This scheme promotes women entrepreneurship by providing subsidized financing under SBP refinance facility. It offers low markup rates, flexible repayment structure and credit guarantee support to reduce collateral requirements and encourage business growth.

processingFee: PKR 4,250 + FED for new vehicles and PKR 4,600 + FED for used vehicles. No processing fee on declined applications.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for women customers holding Soneri Ladies First Account including salaried individuals, businesswomen, self-employed professionals, rental income individuals and foreign remittance receivers. Minimum income requirement PKR 25,000. Maximum age at maturity is 60 years for salaried and remittance individuals and 70 years for self-employed and businesswomen.
description: Soneri Ladies First Car Finance offers a dedicated financing solution for women with competitive markup rates, reduced processing fees, flexible tenure options and priority processing. The facility also provides free accidental insurance coverage linked with the Soneri Ladies First Account.

processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges may apply as per bank policy. Details are communicated at the time of application.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers with minimum landholding of 5 acres. Applicant must meet bank’s Islamic financing criteria and provide valid quotations for tractor purchase.
description: Soneri Mustaqeem Tractor Loan provides Shariah-compliant financing for farmers to purchase tractors and agricultural implements. It offers flexible tenure, high financing percentage and access to both local and imported tractors, supporting agricultural productivity and mechanization.

schemeName: Soneri Farm Production Agriculture Loan – Revolving Credit
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges may apply as per bank policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers engaged in crop production activities including sowing, growing, harvesting and marketing of agricultural produce. Applicant must meet bank’s credit criteria and documentation requirements.
description: This agriculture revolving credit facility allows farmers to manage seasonal working capital efficiently. Customers can withdraw and deposit funds as needed, pay markup only on utilized amount and benefit from simplified documentation and quick processing aligned with SBP policies.

schemeName: Soneri Farm Development & Tractor Agriculture Loan
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges may apply as per bank policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for individuals (male and female) involved in agricultural activities with valid CNIC and proof of cultivation (owned or leased land). Minimum age 18 years and maximum 70 years at loan maturity.
description: This agriculture development financing facility enables farmers to invest in modern equipment, infrastructure and farm expansion. It supports mechanization, irrigation improvements and agricultural productivity with flexible tenure and structured repayment options.

schemeName: Soneri Non-Farm Development Agriculture Loan – Dairy Farming
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges may apply as per bank policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers involved in dairy farming activities. Applicant must meet bank’s agriculture financing criteria and provide proof of farming operations and project requirements.
description: This facility supports dairy farmers in expanding livestock operations and infrastructure by providing financing for animals, equipment and farm construction. It enables productivity growth with structured repayment options and manageable equity contribution.

schemeName: Soneri Non-Farm Development Agriculture Loan – Poultry Farming
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges may apply as per bank policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for individuals operating or planning poultry farming businesses. Applicant must meet bank’s agriculture financing criteria and provide proof of project feasibility.
description: This facility enables poultry farmers to establish or expand poultry farms by financing infrastructure, machinery and operational setup. It supports business growth with structured repayment and manageable equity requirements.

schemeName: Soneri Non-Farm Development Agriculture Loan – Cattle Farming
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges may apply as per bank policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for farmers involved in cattle farming activities. Applicant must meet bank’s agriculture financing criteria and provide proof of farming operations and project feasibility.
description: This financing facility supports cattle farming by enabling farmers to invest in livestock, infrastructure and farm development. It enhances agricultural productivity with structured financing and flexible repayment options.

schemeName: Soneri Non-Farm Development Agriculture Loan – Fish Farming
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges may apply as per bank policy and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for individuals engaged in marine or inland fish farming. Applicant must meet bank’s agriculture financing criteria and provide proof of project feasibility and farming operations.
description: This facility supports fish farming businesses by financing pond development, equipment and operational infrastructure. It enables growth in aquaculture with structured repayment and flexible financing terms.

schemeName: Bank AL Habib Woman Apni Car Finance
processingFee: Processing fee and first-year insurance premium are payable upfront along with down payment. Exact processing fee is applicable as per Bank AL Habib schedule of charges.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani national women holding valid CNIC/SNIC with satisfactory credit history. Salaried applicants must be minimum 23 years old and maximum 60 years at loan maturity. Self-employed/businesswomen/professionals must be minimum 23 years old and maximum 65 years at loan maturity. Account holders of any bank can apply. Applicants with income from employment, business, rental income, agricultural income, remittance, investment income or co-borrower income may be eligible.
description: Bank AL Habib Woman Apni Car enables women to purchase locally manufactured new or used vehicles through convenient repayment plans, easy monthly installments, flexible markup options and quick processing. It also provides accidental insurance coverage and allows both fixed and variable rate options.

schemeName: Bank AL Habib Woman Housing Finance
processingFee: Processing fee and other applicable charges apply as per Bank AL Habib schedule of charges. Property insurance (Takaful) coverage is required at customer's cost.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani national women with satisfactory credit history. Minimum age 25 years and maximum 60 years for salaried individuals and 65 years for self-employed/businesswomen at loan maturity. Minimum income requirement is PKR 60,000 per month for salaried individuals and PKR 100,000 per month for self-employed/businesswomen. Minimum 2 years employment/business history required. Debt Burden Ratio (DBR) up to 50% of net income. Co-applicant option available for income clubbing.
description: Bank AL Habib Woman Housing Finance enables women to purchase, construct, renovate or transfer home financing with long tenure options, competitive markup rates, equal monthly installments and co-borrower flexibility. It also provides life insurance coverage and structured disbursement options for construction financing.

schemeName: Bank AL Habib Scooter / Motorcycle Finance
processingFee: Processing fee and other applicable charges apply as per Bank AL Habib schedule of charges. Insurance/Takaful charges are also applicable.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani nationals holding valid CNIC/SNIC with satisfactory credit history. Minimum age 21 years at approval and maximum 60 years at loan maturity. Minimum income requirement is PKR 40,000 per month with at least 1 year of employment or business experience. Debt Burden Ratio (DBR) must be maintained at 40%.
description: Bank AL Habib Scooter Finance offers an affordable and convenient way to own a motorcycle or scooter with flexible repayment plans, quick processing, minimal documentation and both fixed and variable rate options.

schemeName: Bank AL Habib Kamyab Khatoon Zarai Finance
processingFee: Processing and other applicable charges may apply as per Bank AL Habib schedule of charges and SBP guidelines.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for women involved in agriculture including individual female farmers, joint account holders, co-applicants and firms where a woman has a decision-making role. Applicant must meet bank and SBP eligibility criteria based on agricultural/business profile.
description: Kamyab Khatoon Zarai Finance is designed to empower women in agriculture by providing accessible financing, priority service and discounted markup rates to support agri-business growth and financial inclusion.

schemeName: Bank AL Habib Zarkhez Agriculture Loan Scheme
processingFee: Minimal or subsidized charges may apply as per SBP scheme guidelines and bank policy.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for small farmers owning or cultivating land up to 12.5 acres in Punjab & KPK, 16 acres in Sindh and 32 acres in Balochistan. Applicants must meet SBP and bank eligibility criteria.
description: Zarkhez Scheme provides collateral-free digital agriculture financing to small farmers, enabling quick access to essential farm inputs such as seeds, fertilizers and pesticides through approved agri-merchants along with advisory support.

schemeName: Bank AL Habib Climate Smart Agriculture Finance
processingFee: Applicable as per bank policy and SBP agriculture financing guidelines. Concessional charges may apply for eligible projects.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for individuals and businesses engaged in agriculture and non-farm sectors adopting climate-smart and resource-efficient farming techniques, subject to bank and SBP eligibility criteria.
description: This scheme supports adoption of modern, climate-smart agricultural practices by providing financing for efficient resource utilization, renewable energy solutions and advanced farming technologies to improve productivity and sustainability.

schemeName: Bank AL Habib ApniCar Auto Finance
processingFee: Applicable as per bank policy. Customer must also pay down payment, processing fee and first-year insurance premium at the time of financing.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani nationals holding valid CNIC/SNIC with satisfactory credit history. Applicable for salaried individuals, self-employed persons, and individuals with additional income sources such as remittances, rental, pension or investments.
description: Flexible car financing facility with both fixed and variable rate options. Enables customers to purchase locally manufactured new and used vehicles with easy installment plans and minimal documentation.

schemeName: Bank AL Habib Low Cost Housing Facility for Special Segment
processingFee: Applicable as per bank’s Schedule of Charges. Additional costs include property valuation, legal documentation and insurance charges borne by the customer.
eligibilityCriteria: Available for Pakistani nationals belonging to special segments including widows, children of martyrs, differently-abled persons, transgender individuals and residents of designated districts. Applicant must meet income, age and credit criteria defined by the bank and SBP.
description: Affordable housing finance facility designed for low-income and special segments to support construction of new housing units with subsidized fixed markup and flexible repayment structure.
